<!--
Thanks for contributing to Hiver! Please review the following notes before submitting a pull request.

感谢你对 Hiver 的贡献！提交 PR 前请审阅以下说明。

## Security Vulnerabilities / 安全漏洞

STOP! If your contribution fixes a security vulnerability, please do not submit it.
Instead, please report it via email to security@hiver.dev.

注意！如果你的贡献修复了安全漏洞，请不要提交 PR。
请通过邮件发送至 security@hiver.dev 进行报告。

## Describing Your Changes / 描述你的改动

Please provide a brief description of the proposed changes:
请简要描述你的改动：

- If they fix a bug, describe the broken behaviour and how the changes fix it.
- If they make an enhancement, describe the new functionality and why it's useful.
- If your pull request relates to any existing issues, reference them with #issue_number.

- 如果修复 bug，描述错误行为及修复方式。
- 如果是增强功能，描述新功能及其用途。
- 如果 PR 关联已有 issue，请用 #issue_number 引用。

## Checklist / 检查清单

- [ ] I have read the [CLAUDE.md](CLAUDE.md) coding standards
- [ ] `cargo fmt` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy` passes
- [ ] `cargo test` passes
- [ ] Public APIs have bilingual documentation (English + Chinese)
-->

## Summary / 摘要

## Related Issue / 关联 Issue

## Test Plan / 测试计划
